docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 759481 FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHORGE, JIM AS TO DEFENDANT TUIMANUA, WILLIE DBA AMERICA PACIFIC INTERNATIONAL IEREMIA, MILA
